description: Atomic knowledge note — the building block of team-wide institutional memory. Notes have typed content, structured links, lifecycle states, and provenance tracking.
name: KnowledgeNote

global.schema:
enum NoteStatus {
    DRAFT
    IN_REVIEW
    CANONICAL
    ARCHIVED
}

enum SourceOrigin {
    MANUAL
    SESSION_MINE
    IMPORT
    DERIVED
}

enum LinkType {
    RELATES_TO
    BUILDS_ON
    CONTRADICTS
    SUPERSEDES
    DERIVED_FROM
}

type KnowledgeNoteState {
    title: String
    description: String
    noteType: String
    content: String
    status: NoteStatus
    provenance: Provenance
    links: [NoteLink!]!
    topics: [Topic!]!
    scope: String
    confidence: String
    severity: String
    editor: String
    models: [String!]!
    hooksUsed: [String!]!
    dispatchTargets: [String!]!
    modelId: String
    modules: [String!]!
    version: String
    filePath: String
    computes: String
    inputs: [String!]!
    outputs: [String!]!
    consumedBy: [String!]!
    context: String
    alternatives: [String!]!
    consequences: [String!]!
    decisionStatus: String
    model: String
    sourceType: String
    targetType: String
    relationType: String
    cardinality: String
    errorMessage: String
    rootCause: String
    correctPattern: String
    lifecycleEvents: [LifecycleEvent!]!
}

type Provenance {
    author: String
    sourceOrigin: SourceOrigin
    sessionId: String
    createdAt: DateTime
    updatedAt: DateTime
}

type NoteLink {
    id: OID!
    targetDocumentId: String
    targetTitle: String
    linkType: LinkType
}

type Topic {
    id: OID!
    name: String!
    topicDocumentId: String
}

type LifecycleEvent {
    id: OID!
    fromStatus: NoteStatus
    toStatus: NoteStatus
    actor: String
    timestamp: DateTime
    comment: String
}
